findings.evidence: Flow step 2 depends on a reconciling component defined nowhere — not in the container table, not in the codebase inventory, not in any goal.
Nothing routes a changed rota entry to NotificationService — its sole listed duty is the Monday send, so the told-within-an-hour obligation has no carrying edge.
Provisioning for a hundred thousand concurrent sessions imports a scale requirement the goals never state; the stated reality is two hundred volunteers.
A leaderboard and award system answer no goal; the requirements record explicitly closes the list at six.
